summary: Frontend review of FR-PERS-001 (Issue #13) is complete. PR #48 (merged to main on 2026-04-15) has been reviewed and APPROVED. All 3 implementation files (ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, persistenceService.ts) and all 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are verified correct. No blocking issues found. Two non-blocking observations noted: (1) loadModel has no schema version validation — acceptable for v1.0.0, (2) performance test uses mocked LocalForage — acceptable scope. Implementation is production-ready and ready for human gate review (gate-6b-feature-pr).

artifacts.name: ActionBar.tsx
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons — data-testid=btn-save, async handleSave, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notifications

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay — role=status, aria-live=polite, includes('error') detection, auto-dismiss via ActionBar notify()

artifacts.name: persistenceService.ts
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage — schema version 1.0.0, PersistedModel interface, full Brick[] serialization

artifacts.name: persistenceService.test.ts
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-01: Save serializes all brick data — verifies version, savedAt, full bricks array

artifacts.name: persistenceService.performance.test.ts
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-02: Save completes within 500ms for 1000 bricks

artifacts.name: SaveModel.behavioral.test.tsx
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-03: Clicking Save shows success notification — renders full App

artifacts.name: ActionBar.test.tsx
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-04: Save shows error when storage is full (QuotaExceededError)

artifacts.name: PR #48
artifacts.description: FR-PERS-001 implementation — MERGED to main on 2026-04-15

artifacts.name: Review Comment
artifacts.description: Comprehensive frontend review report — APPROVED verdict

human_review_required.description: Human approval gate for FR-PERS-001 feature — review merged PR #48 and confirm implementation meets product requirements

recommended_actions: Proceed to gate-6b-feature-pr for human approval of FR-PERS-001 implementation
Human reviewer should verify PR #48 diff at https://github.com/sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1/pull/48
Consider closing Issue #13 — implementation complete and merged
Non-blocking: Add schema version check in loadModel when SCHEMA_VERSION is next incremented
Non-blocking: Document that T-FE-PERS-001-02 performance test uses mocked LocalForage (tests serialization overhead only)
